summary: Iteration 7 - Optimistic UI for equipment coupling (pool kiosk 1024x600). ALL 5 SCENARIOS PASS. Backend regression: 7/7 pytest tests pass (test_equipment_events.py). Scenario 1: With filtration+electrolyseur both ON, tapping equipment-toggle-filtration flips BOTH switches to OFF within ~150ms in the UI (well under the 500ms target) - optimistic setData in handleToggleEquipment mirrors the pump-stops-electro coupling client-side before the backend response. Scenario 2: With pump OFF, tapping equipment-toggle-electrolyseur ON is refused by backend (409); switch reverts immediately and the red toast (data-testid=global-toast) appears with the exact message 'L'électrolyseur ne peut pas fonctionner sans la pompe. Démarrez d'abord la filtration.' - contains both 'électrolyseur' and 'pompe' as required. Toast auto-dismisses after ~4.5s (verified: gone at 5s). Scenario 3: Journal des évènements shows the two expected top events - ('filtration','user','off') with reason 'Action manuelle depuis l'interface' AND ('electrolyseur','coupling','off') with reason 'Arrêt automatique suite à l'arrêt de la pompe'. UI rows render with correct source badge (Utilisateur, Couplage auto). Scenario 4: Backend regression passes - GET /api/equipment/events, POST /api/equipment/filtration/toggle, POST /api/equipment/electrolyseur/toggle (409 with pump off) all work as expected. Scenario 5: Dashboard EquipmentCard uses the same centralized handleToggleEquipment - toggling filtration on the dashboard produces the same instant optimistic cascade to electrolyseur (both False within ~150ms). Only benign warnings remain: 'shadow* deprecated' and 'props.pointerEvents deprecated' from third-party libs (react-native-web / gesture-handler), already flagged in iter 5-6.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' - originates from RN-Web on the toast/card shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset props. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:260 (toast style) and Widgets card styles. Non-blocking but should be migrated to boxShadow on web.
Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - originates from a third-party lib (gesture-handler/reanimated). Non-blocking, same as iter 5-6.

action_items: (Optional / non-blocking) Migrate `shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset` on the toast style in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx to `boxShadow` (or wrap in Platform.select) to silence the RN-Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: handleToggleEquipment in app/index.tsx does NOT snapshot the previous equipment array before the optimistic mutation. If the backend fails (e.g. 409 electrolyseur without pump), the code relies on the subsequent reload() to overwrite state with the server truth. This works today because reload() is always called after the try/catch, but the UX briefly shows the illegal state (~2-2.5s of the polling window) before reverting. A defensive pattern would be to snapshot prev and setData(snapshot) inside catch, then still call reload(). Currently the switch snaps back within one polling cycle, which the test confirmed - acceptable but worth documenting.

EquipmentPage still keeps its own `toggle(id,next)` wrapper that calls the centralized onToggleEquipment and then setTimeout(loadEvents, 700). That's fine, but note the events poll (every 8s) plus the 700ms one-shot creates 2 fetches per toggle. Minor, non-blocking.
The toast styling uses shadow* props (deprecated on web) and a hardcoded translateX:-220 for centering a 440px-wide toast. Fine for the 1024x600 kiosk but not responsive. Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: None - used defaults + programmatic POSTs to /api/equipment/{id}/toggle to prime pump+electro ON before each optimistic-UI test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Optimistic coupling verified. handleToggleEquipment lives in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx and is passed as onToggleEquipment prop to both DashboardScreen and EquipmentPage. Both screens use the shared EquipmentCard from Widgets.tsx (testID pattern: equipment-toggle-<id>). Global toast is rendered in index.tsx (testID=global-toast) with 4.5s auto-dismiss. Backend endpoints unchanged. Playwright snippet used: click switch -> wait 150ms -> read `input[type=checkbox]`.checked inside the [data-testid=...] container. RN-Web Switch renders a real checkbox so `.checked` works reliably.
rca_of_issue: N/A - iteration built and validated the fix; no regressions found.
